text: Moving from the clean, almost clinical quiet of the glass-walled meeting room to the vivid, thought-provoking R+D exhibit fills me with a subtle jolt of energy. The shift from sterile order to creative chaos is disorienting yet invigorating—a reminder of the thin veil between routine and revelation. I feel compelled to linger in this new space, where meaning feels just out of reach, urging me to keep questioning and exploring.
